name: primary_key
description: Source-side stable row identifier for deterministic provenance and writeback keys.

name: timestamp
description: Half-hour observation timestamp in UTC.

name: filename
description: EddyPro source filename associated with the half-hour record.

name: DOY
description: EddyPro day-of-year value from the source export.

name: daytime
description: EddyPro daytime flag from the source export.

name: H
description: Sensible heat flux from the carbon-flux source table.

name: qc_H
description: Quality-control flag for sensible heat flux H.

name: LE
description: Latent heat flux from the carbon-flux source table.

name: qc_LE
description: Quality-control flag for latent heat flux LE.

name: co2_flux
description: CO2 flux from the carbon-flux source table; internal eddy processing uses NEE.

name: qc_co2_flux
description: Quality-control flag for co2_flux; internal eddy processing uses QC_NEE.

name: h2o_flux
description: Water-vapor flux from the carbon-flux source table; pass-through provenance field.

name: qc_h2o_flux
description: Quality-control flag for h2o_flux; pass-through provenance field.

name: H_strg
description: Storage correction term for sensible heat flux from the source export.

name: LE_strg
description: Storage correction term for latent heat flux from the source export.

name: co2_strg
description: CO2 storage term from the source export.

name: h2o_strg
description: H2O storage term from the source export.

name: co2_molar_density
description: CO2 molar density from the source export.

name: co2_mole_fraction
description: CO2 mole fraction from the source export.

name: co2_mixing_ratio
description: CO2 mixing ratio from the source export.

name: h2o_molar_density
description: H2O molar density from the source export.

name: h2o_mole_fraction
description: H2O mole fraction from the source export.

name: h2o_mixing_ratio
description: H2O mixing ratio from the source export.

name: sonic_temperature
description: Sonic temperature from the source export.

name: air_temperature
description: Air temperature from the carbon-flux source table, expected in K before miaproc conversion.

name: air_pressure
description: Air pressure from the source export.

name: air_density
description: Air density from the source export.

name: air_heat_capacity
description: Air heat capacity from the source export.

name: air_molar_volume
description: Air molar volume from the source export.

name: ET
description: Evapotranspiration from the source export.

name: water_vapor_density
description: Water-vapor density from the source export.

name: e
description: Actual vapor pressure from the source export.

name: es
description: Saturation vapor pressure from the source export.

name: specific_humidity
description: Specific humidity from the source export.

name: RH
description: Flux-side relative humidity from the carbon-flux source table; preserved separately from biomet RH_1_1_1.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit from the carbon-flux source table, expected in Pa before miaproc conversion.

name: Tdew
description: Dew-point temperature from the source export.

name: wind_speed
description: Mean wind speed from the source export.

name: max_wind_speed
description: Maximum wind speed from the source export.

name: wind_dir
description: Wind direction from the source export.

name: u_star
description: Friction velocity from the carbon-flux source table; internal eddy processing uses USTAR.

name: TKE
description: Turbulent kinetic energy from the source export.

name: L
description: Obukhov length from the source export.

name: z_minus_d_div_L
description: Atmospheric stability ratio (z-d)/L from the source export.

name: bowen_ratio
description: Bowen ratio from the source export.

name: x_peak
description: Footprint peak distance from the source export.

name: x_offset
description: Footprint offset distance from the source export.

name: x_10_pct
description: Footprint distance containing 10 percent cumulative contribution.

name: x_30_pct
description: Footprint distance containing 30 percent cumulative contribution.

name: x_50_pct
description: Footprint distance containing 50 percent cumulative contribution.

name: x_70_pct
description: Footprint distance containing 70 percent cumulative contribution.

name: x_90_pct
description: Footprint distance containing 90 percent cumulative contribution.

name: v_var
description: Lateral wind variance from the source export.

name: site_id
description: site_id from the eddy source/export; preserved by miaproc when present.
